req.title: Account statement generation
req.statement: A customer shall request monthly statements as PDF; statements older than 7 years shall be fetched from cold storage.

doc.reasoning: The requirement covers three distinct behaviours: (1) normal hot-storage retrieval of a recent monthly statement as a PDF, (2) cold-storage retrieval for statements older than 7 years, (3) 404 when the requested period has no activity, and (4) 503 when cold storage is unavailable. The 7-year boundary is the natural BVA pivot. EP partitions the date space into recent (<= 7 years) vs. archived (> 7 years). NEG covers missing activity and cold-storage failure. STC captures the state change from hot to cold storage at the 7-year threshold. DT is used to verify the combination of authentication + ownership + period validity. All tests use a pre-seeded fixture account to remain idempotent and deterministic.

tests.name: test_recent_statement_returns_pdf
preconditions: Statement for the target month exists in hot storage
Target month is within the last 7 years
actions: GET /statements/{month} with month = current month minus 1 (YYYY-MM format)
Include Bearer token in Authorization header
expected: Response body is non-empty binary PDF data
Audit log entry created for the retrieval (verified via <log_fixture>)
tests.executable:
import pytest
import datetime

def test_recent_statement_returns_pdf(auth_client, log_fixture, hot_storage_statement):
    month = (datetime.date.today().replace(day=1) - datetime.timedelta(days=1)).strftime("%Y-%m")
    response = auth_client.get(f"/statements/{month}")

    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.headers["Content-Type"] == "application/pdf"
    assert len(response.content) > 0
    assert response.headers.get("X-Retrieval-Source") == "hot"
    assert log_fixture.contains_entry(action="statement_retrieved", month=month)

tests.name: test_statement_no_activity_returns_404
preconditions: No transactions exist for the requested month (guaranteed by <empty_period_fixture>)
actions: GET /statements/{month} with a month that has no account activity
Include Bearer token in Authorization header
trace: R-FIN-008: error pathway - 404 if no activity in period
tests.executable:
import pytest

def test_statement_no_activity_returns_404(auth_client, empty_period_fixture):
    month = empty_period_fixture.month  # month guaranteed to have no transactions
    response = auth_client.get(f"/statements/{month}")

    assert response.status_code == 404
    body = response.json()
    assert body.get("error_code") == "NO_ACTIVITY_IN_PERIOD"
    assert "application/pdf" not in response.headers.get("Content-Type", "")

tests.name: test_statement_exactly_7_years_old_uses_cold_storage
preconditions: Statement for the exact 7-year boundary month exists in cold storage (seeded by <cold_storage_fixture>)
actions: Calculate month = today minus exactly 84 months (7 * 12)
Include Bearer token in Authorization header
expected: Response body is non-empty binary PDF data
Audit log entry created for the retrieval
trace: R-FIN-008: statements older than 7 years shall be fetched from cold storage
tests.executable:
import pytest
import datetime
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

def test_statement_exactly_7_years_old_uses_cold_storage(auth_client, cold_storage_fixture, log_fixture):
    boundary_date = datetime.date.today() - relativedelta(months=84)
    month = boundary_date.strftime("%Y-%m")
    cold_storage_fixture.seed(month=month)

    response = auth_client.get(f"/statements/{month}")

    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.headers["Content-Type"] == "application/pdf"
    assert len(response.content) > 0
    assert response.headers.get("X-Retrieval-Source") == "cold"
    assert log_fixture.contains_entry(action="statement_retrieved", month=month)

tests.name: test_cold_storage_unavailable_returns_503
preconditions: Requested month is older than 7 years
Cold storage service is simulated as unavailable via <cold_storage_fixture>
actions: GET /statements/{month} with a month older than 7 years
Include Bearer token in Authorization header
trace: R-FIN-008: error pathway - 503 if cold storage unavailable
tests.executable:
import pytest
import datetime
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

def test_cold_storage_unavailable_returns_503(auth_client, cold_storage_fixture):
    archived_month = (datetime.date.today() - relativedelta(months=100)).strftime("%Y-%m")
    cold_storage_fixture.set_unavailable()

    response = auth_client.get(f"/statements/{archived_month}")

    assert response.status_code == 503
    body = response.json()
    assert body.get("error_code") == "COLD_STORAGE_UNAVAILABLE"
    assert "application/pdf" not in response.headers.get("Content-Type", "")

tests.name: test_unauthorized_caller_cannot_access_statement
preconditions: A valid account exists owned by customer A
Caller is authenticated as customer B (different owner)
Statement for the target month exists in hot storage for customer A
actions: Authenticate as customer B using <auth_fixture> with a different account
GET /statements/{month} targeting customer A's account via path param
Include customer B's Bearer token in Authorization header
expected: Response body contains error code 'FORBIDDEN' or 'ACCESS_DENIED'
trace: R-FIN-008: precondition - account.owner == caller must hold
tests.executable:
import pytest
import datetime

def test_unauthorized_caller_cannot_access_statement(auth_client_b, account_a_month_fixture):
    month = account_a_month_fixture.month
    # auth_client_b is authenticated as a different customer than account_a owner
    response = auth_client_b.get(f"/statements/{month}")

    assert response.status_code == 403
    body = response.json()
    assert body.get("error_code") in ("FORBIDDEN", "ACCESS_DENIED")
    assert "application/pdf" not in response.headers.get("Content-Type", "")

tests.name: test_statement_one_month_before_7_year_boundary_uses_hot_storage
preconditions: Statement for month at 83 months ago exists in hot storage (seeded by <hot_storage_fixture>)
actions: Calculate month = today minus 83 months (one month inside hot-storage window)
Include Bearer token in Authorization header
expected: Response body is non-empty binary PDF data
trace: R-FIN-008: statements older than 7 years fetched from cold storage (negative boundary - 83 months stays in hot)
tests.executable:
import pytest
import datetime
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

def test_statement_one_month_before_7_year_boundary_uses_hot_storage(auth_client, hot_storage_fixture):
    near_boundary_date = datetime.date.today() - relativedelta(months=83)
    month = near_boundary_date.strftime("%Y-%m")
    hot_storage_fixture.seed(month=month)

    response = auth_client.get(f"/statements/{month}")

    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.headers["Content-Type"] == "application/pdf"
    assert response.headers.get("X-Retrieval-Source") == "hot"
    assert len(response.content) > 0
